heroes.name: Sir Aldric Valorheart
heroes.title: The Iron Bastion
heroes.lore: Born in the fortified city of Valorheim, Aldric rose through the ranks of the Crusade militia to become its most decorated champion. His unbreakable will and mastery of sword and shield have turned the tide of countless battles against the Legion.
heroes.backstory: Orphaned during the First Grudge War, young Aldric was raised by the Temple Knights. He forged his first blade at age twelve and took his oath at sixteen. Now he leads the vanguard of every Crusade offensive, his golden armor a beacon of hope.
heroes.quote: "The shield breaks before the will does."

abilities.name: Invincibility
abilities.description: Become immune to all damage for a short duration

heroes.flavorText: Where Aldric stands, the line holds.

heroes.name: Gareth Moonshadow
heroes.title: The Twilight Stalker
heroes.lore: Gareth was a simple huntsman until a dire wolf spirit bonded with his soul during a blood moon ritual. Now he walks between the worlds of man and beast, his primal fury tempered by human discipline.
heroes.backstory: Once captain of the Crusade rangers, Gareth ventured too deep into the Darkwood seeking a cure for a plague. There, the ancient Wolf Spirit Fenrath chose him as vessel. He returned changed, his eyes gleaming amber in the dark.
heroes.quote: "The beast within is not my curse. It is my salvation."

abilities.name: Worg Lord
abilities.description: +40% all stats, +50% max HP, summon pack

heroes.flavorText: In the space between howl and silence, death waits.

heroes.name: Archmage Elara Brightspire
heroes.title: The Storm Caller
heroes.lore: Elara was the youngest scholar ever admitted to the Arcane Consortium. Her mastery of elemental magic and divine healing makes her invaluable on the battlefield, though her fragile form demands protection.
heroes.backstory: Raised in the Brightspire Academy, Elara discovered she could channel both arcane destruction and divine healing, a gift unseen in centuries. The Consortium fears her power; the Crusade depends on it.
heroes.quote: "Knowledge is the flame. I am merely the torch."

abilities.name: Mana Shield
abilities.description: Passive shield based on remaining mana percentage

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.description: AoE fire damage to enemies in target area

abilities.name: Lightning Chain
abilities.description: Chain lightning hitting up to 5 targets

heroes.flavorText: The sky splits at her command.

heroes.name: Kael Shadowblade
heroes.title: The Shadow Blade
heroes.lore: A ghost who moves through shadows, Kael is the Crusade's deadliest operative. His arrows find their mark before the enemy even knows war has begun. He answers to no one but the cause.
heroes.backstory: Kael grew up in the slums of Port Grimaldi, learning to survive through cunning and speed. Recruited by the Crusade's covert division, he became their finest scout and assassin, preferring to end wars before they start.
heroes.quote: "You never see the arrow that kills you."

abilities.name: Precision
abilities.description: Passive accuracy and critical hit bonus

abilities.name: Power Shot
abilities.description: High damage ranged attack at 2x damage

abilities.name: Multi Shot
abilities.description: Fire 5 arrows in a spread pattern

heroes.flavorText: Shadows are just arrows waiting to be loosed.

heroes.name: Ulfgar Bonecrusher
heroes.title: The Mountain Breaker
heroes.lore: From the frozen peaks of the Northlands, Ulfgar descends like an avalanche upon his foes. His massive frame and berserker fury make him a force of nature that no shield wall can withstand.
heroes.backstory: Ulfgar earned his title by literally shattering a mountain pass to prevent a Legion invasion, burying an entire army beneath tons of stone. The act cost him his left eye but saved his entire tribe.
heroes.quote: "I do not fight to survive. I fight because the mountain told me to."
heroes.flavorText: The earth trembles when Ulfgar charges.

heroes.name: Hrothgar Fangborn
heroes.title: The Beast of the North
heroes.lore: In the deepest winter, when wolves howl for blood, Hrothgar answers. Half-man, half-beast, he leads a pack of dire wolves across the frozen wastes, hunting Legion scouts with savage precision.
heroes.backstory: Born during an eclipse, Hrothgar was left in the woods as an omen of doom. Raised by a great wolf mother, he returned to his tribe as a teenager who could speak with beasts and shift his form at will.
heroes.quote: "The pack does not forgive. The pack does not forget."

abilities.name: Worg Lord
abilities.description: Ultimate tank form with pack summon

heroes.flavorText: When the north wind howls, it speaks his name.

heroes.name: Volka Stormborn
heroes.title: The Frost Witch
heroes.lore: The northern shamans channel magic through primal fury rather than scholarly study. Volka commands blizzards and lightning, her spells fueled by the raw rage of the frozen north.
heroes.backstory: During a deadly blizzard that buried her village, young Volka discovered she could command the storm itself. The tribal elders named her Stormborn and sent her south to aid the Crusade with her elemental fury.
heroes.quote: "Winter does not come. I bring it."
heroes.flavorText: Her anger is the storm. Her mercy is the calm.

heroes.name: Svala Windrider
heroes.title: The Silent Huntress
heroes.lore: No prey escapes Svala. She tracks across frozen tundra, through blinding snowstorms, reading the land like an open book. Her arrows are tipped with the venom of ice serpents.
heroes.backstory: Svala was the youngest hunter to ever complete the Trial of the Winter Hunt, tracking and slaying a frost drake alone at age fourteen. Now she serves as the Crusade's premier wilderness scout.
heroes.quote: "The wind tells me where you hide."
heroes.flavorText: She does not miss. She does not warn.

heroes.name: Thane Ironshield
heroes.title: The Mountain Guardian
heroes.lore: The Thane of Ironhold has defended the mountain passes for over a century. His enchanted shield, Aegis of Ancestors, was forged from the heart of the mountain itself and has never been pierced.
heroes.backstory: Thane Ironshield is the 47th guardian of the Deep Gate, an unbroken lineage stretching back to the founding of Stonehold. When the Grudge Wars began, he sealed the lower mines and marched to war.
heroes.quote: "Deeper than stone. Harder than iron. We endure."
heroes.flavorText: The mountain does not move. Neither does he.

heroes.name: Bromm Earthshaker
heroes.title: The Cavern Beast
heroes.lore: Deep beneath the mountains, Bromm discovered an ancient bear spirit imprisoned in crystal. By freeing it, the spirit merged with his dwarven soul, creating something unprecedented: a shapeshifter of living stone.
heroes.backstory: Bromm was a miner who broke through into a sealed cavern containing a primordial earth spirit. The merging nearly killed him but left him able to transform into a creature of rock and fury.
heroes.quote: "The mountain has teeth. I am its bite."
heroes.flavorText: The deep places remember. Bromm makes them forget.

heroes.name: Runa Forgekeeper
heroes.title: The Runesmith
heroes.lore: Dwarven magic is not the flashy arcana of elves or humans. It is the deep magic of rune and forge, of fire shaped by will and hammer. Runa channels this ancient craft in battle.
heroes.backstory: Last of the Forgekeeper bloodline, Runa carries the knowledge of runic magic that predates the Grudge Wars. Her forge-spells burn hotter than dragonfire and her rune-shields are nigh unbreakable.
heroes.quote: "Every rune tells a story. Mine tells of fire."
strengths: Stoneborn makes her tankier than other mages
heroes.flavorText: The forge burns eternal. So does she.

heroes.name: Durin Tunnelwatcher
heroes.title: The Deep Scout
heroes.lore: Not all dwarves fight on the front line. Durin patrols the endless tunnels beneath the mountains, his crossbow picking off threats in the dark long before they reach the surface.
heroes.backstory: Durin lost his squad to a cave-in during a tunnel patrol. Alone in the dark for thirty days, he learned to navigate by echo and smell. He emerged transformed, able to fight in total darkness.
heroes.quote: "In the deep, every sound is a target."
heroes.flavorText: He sees in the dark. You do not see him.

heroes.name: Thalion Bladedancer
heroes.title: The Graceful Death
heroes.lore: Elven warriors do not rely on brute force. Thalion's blade moves like water, each stroke a masterwork of precision. He has dueled and defeated opponents twice his size through technique alone.
heroes.backstory: Trained in the Moonblade Academy for three centuries, Thalion mastered every weapon form before settling on the twin curved blades that earned him his title. His dance-like fighting style is mesmerizing and lethal.
heroes.quote: "A blade is a brush. Combat is art."
heroes.flavorText: His enemies never see the second strike.

heroes.name: Sylara Wildheart
heroes.title: The Forest Spirit
heroes.lore: Sylara is the last of the Wildheart druids who once protected the great forests. She channels the spirits of ancient beasts through elven magic, her transformations enhanced by centuries of arcane study.
heroes.backstory: When the Darkwood began to wither from Legion corruption, Sylara performed the ancient Rite of Binding, merging her soul with the forest's guardian spirit. Now she IS the forest's wrath.
heroes.quote: "The forest breathes through me. And it is angry."
heroes.flavorText: She wears the shapes of forgotten gods.

heroes.name: Lyra Stormweaver
heroes.title: The Storm Weaver
heroes.lore: Elven mages are the most powerful spellcasters in all the realms. Lyra channels the raw essence of the ley lines, her magic amplified by centuries of study and an innate arcane connection.
heroes.backstory: Lyra spent four hundred years studying in the Crystal Spire before the Grudge Wars forced her into battle. Her mastery of all eight schools of magic makes her the most versatile caster alive.
heroes.quote: "Magic is not power. It is understanding. I understand everything."
heroes.flavorText: The stars whisper their secrets to her alone.

heroes.name: Aelindra Swiftbow
heroes.title: The Wind Walker
heroes.lore: The greatest archer to ever live, Aelindra can split an arrow at three hundred paces while riding at full gallop. Her elven eyes miss nothing, and her enchanted bow never runs dry.
heroes.backstory: Captain of the Silverglade Sentinels for two centuries, Aelindra has defended the borders of the Fabled lands against every threat. She trained under Lyra Stormweaver and infuses her arrows with arcane energy.
heroes.quote: "I loosed the arrow yesterday. It arrives tomorrow. You die today."
heroes.flavorText: Her arrows sing the songs of extinction.

heroes.name: Grommash Ironjaw
heroes.title: The Warchief
heroes.lore: The mightiest warrior the Legion has ever produced, Grommash earned his chieftainship by defeating every challenger in the Pit of Blood. His massive cleaver has carved a path of destruction across three continents.
heroes.backstory: Born during a blood eclipse, Grommash was destined for war. At age six he killed his first opponent in the fighting pits. By twenty he had united the warring orc clans under a single banner through sheer force.
heroes.quote: "BLOOD AND THUNDER!"
heroes.flavorText: He does not ask for surrender.

heroes.name: Fenris Bloodfang
heroes.title: The Alpha
heroes.lore: Fenris challenged the great dire wolf Shadowmaw to single combat and won, absorbing the beast's spirit. Now he commands the Legion's beast packs, his howl freezing enemies in terror.
heroes.backstory: Exiled from his clan for refusing to kill prisoners, Fenris wandered the Ashlands alone until Shadowmaw found him. Their battle lasted three days. When it ended, they were one being.
heroes.quote: "I am the alpha. There is no omega."
heroes.flavorText: His shadow has teeth.

heroes.name: Zul'jin the Hexmaster
heroes.title: The Blood Shaman
heroes.lore: Orc magic is blood magic, raw and dangerous. Zul'jin channels the life force of fallen enemies into devastating hexes and dark healing, growing stronger with every kill.
heroes.backstory: Born with the gift of blood-sight, Zul'jin was taken by the Legion's war shamans at birth. He learned to weaponize pain itself, turning enemy suffering into fuel for his dark arts.
heroes.quote: "Your blood screams louder than you do."
strengths: Bloodrage boosts spell damage when wounded
heroes.flavorText: He paints with the colors of agony.

heroes.name: Razak Deadeye
heroes.title: The Trophy Hunter
heroes.lore: Razak hunts for glory, not survival. His trophy rack holds the heads of legendary beasts, and his poison-tipped bolts bring down prey that should be impossible to kill.
heroes.backstory: A disgraced warrior who lost his sword arm in battle, Razak reinvented himself as a marksman. His custom war-crossbow fires bolts that can penetrate dragon scale at fifty paces.
heroes.quote: "Every head on my wall was once the strongest in its land."
strengths: Bloodrage makes him lethal when wounded
heroes.flavorText: His trophies whisper of things that should not die.

heroes.name: Lord Malachar
heroes.title: The Deathless Knight
heroes.lore: Once a noble paladin, Malachar was slain and raised by dark necromancy. Now he fights with the skill of his former life but the relentless endurance of undeath, unable to feel pain or fear.
heroes.backstory: Sir Malachar the Pure was the greatest knight of his age until he fell defending a temple. The necromancer who raised him twisted his devotion into dark loyalty. He remembers fragments of who he was and hates what he has become.
heroes.quote: "I cannot die. I have tried."
strengths: Highest effective HP from Undying bonus
heroes.flavorText: Death was just the beginning of his war.

heroes.name: The Ghoulfather
heroes.title: The Abomination
heroes.lore: A failed necromantic experiment that merged a warrior's corpse with several beast spirits. The result is an abomination that shifts between grotesque forms, each more terrifying than the last.
heroes.backstory: The Ghoulfather was created when a desperate necromancer tried to bind multiple animal spirits to a single corpse. The spirits fought for dominance, creating an entity that shifts between forms uncontrollably, driven by rage.
heroes.quote: "We... are... HUNGRY."
strengths: Undying + Bear Form = massive HP pool
heroes.flavorText: It remembers being three different things. None of them were kind.

heroes.name: Necromancer Vexis
heroes.title: The Soul Harvester
heroes.lore: Vexis died as a scholar of the arcane arts and was raised specifically for her magical knowledge. In undeath, her power has grown beyond mortal limits, fueled by harvested souls.
heroes.backstory: In life, Vexis was a renowned healer. The irony is not lost on her, she now commands the very forces of death she once fought against. Her soul spells tear the life essence from enemies.
heroes.quote: "Death is not the end. It is the door to real power."
strengths: Undying makes her surprisingly durable for a mage
heroes.flavorText: She weaves spells from the screams of the fallen.

heroes.name: Shade Whisper
heroes.title: The Phantom Archer
heroes.lore: Once the finest scout in the Crusade, Shade Whisper was killed and raised to serve the very forces she once hunted. Her spectral arrows pass through armor as if it were mist.
heroes.backstory: In life she was named Elena Brightarrow, and she was beloved by her comrades. Now she hunts them with the same skill, her phantom arrows guided by the memories of a life she can no longer feel.
heroes.quote: "I remember your face. I remember all their faces."
heroes.flavorText: Her arrows carry the weight of a life she can never reclaim.

heroes.name: Racalvin the Pirate King
heroes.title: The Scourge of the Grudge Ocean Line
heroes.lore: Legend speaks of a pirate so ruthless that even the sea feared him. Racalvin conquered the Grudge Ocean Line with nothing but a stolen ship and a crew of outcasts, building an empire of plunder and freedom.
heroes.backstory: Born as the bastard son of a barbarian chieftain and a merchant's daughter, Racalvin was cast out at birth. He stowed away on a merchant vessel at age eight, mutinied at twelve, and by twenty commanded a fleet of thirty ships. His true name became synonymous with freedom and terror across every port.
heroes.quote: "The sea does not bow. Neither do I."
strengths: Highest base stats of any hero
Pirate King bonus on top of racial traits
heroes.flavorText: Crowns are taken. Thrones are stolen. The sea is earned.
